title: Turns our radiation therapy is NOT necessary for intermediate-risk BC
body:
This new [study](https://www.nejm.org/doi/full/10.1056/NEJMoa2412225) in the New England Journal of Medicine shows that people with grade 1-2, 1-3 nodes involvement BC do NOT benefit from radiation therapy. 

I am both so happy that this will spare others RT, but I so wish this study had come out a year ago, when I had to do radiation therapy that left me crying on the table every damn day for three weeks and with skin discoloration that persists to today. All of that was unnecessary, and instead those of us in this situation face the risk of lymphoedema and ancillary cancers down the road. 

AFter all these months, I would have thought I dealt with it all, but these news have left me so upset and shaken.
